# Small Task Fixture

- **Project**: nestads-backend
- **Created**: 2026-04-14
- **Updated**: 2026-04-16

## Goal

Implement a lightweight token budget for the lake resume command.
Ensure protected sections (blockers, unresolved tasks) are never truncated.
Add a --view flag to opt-in to compressed output.
Verify byte-identical output with v0 golden baseline.
Write snapshot tests to catch regressions automatically.
